creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
makc        2008-08-31 13:07:42 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Added files:
    x11-themes/qtcurve-gtk2 Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  QtCurve is a set of widget styles for Qt4/KDE4, KDE3 and Gtk2 based apps.
  This port provides GTK2 theme engine.
  
  PR:             126940
  Submitted by:   Dmitry Klimov <lazyklimm at gmail.com>
  Approved by:    miwi (mentor)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1       +23 -0     ports/x11-themes/qtcurve-gtk2/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/x11-themes/qtcurve-gtk2/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/x11-themes/qtcurve-gtk2/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +12 -0     ports/x11-themes/qtcurve-gtk2/pkg-plist (new)
